marketing.hook: 老闆說猜錯有懲罰的恐懼與好奇心

perShot.promptTemplate: {character} stands in {scene} talking to camera, showing {emotion} expression, {style} style.
A hand passes {product} to {character} in {scene}, {style} style.
{character} is tasting {product} in {scene} with {emotion} expression, {style} style.
Close-up of {product} inside a beaker with straws in {scene}, {style} style.
{character} laughing loudly after tasting {product}, showing high {emotion}, {style} style.
{character} cheering and jumping in {scene} celebrating the result, {style} style.

variables.character: an outgoing female host in a grey and blue uniform
variables.scene: a professional food R&D laboratory with stainless steel equipment
variables.product: mutton hot pot soup in a laboratory beaker
variables.emotion: ranging from confusion and hesitation to extreme excitement
variables.style: fast-paced social media video with variety show captions
variables.product_feature: dark herbal soup base with chewy mutton chunks

systemInference.notes: The analysis successfully mapped situational narrative and humorous tone to the JSON schema.
